scripts.dev: docker compose up -d postgres redis minio && turbo run dev --parallel
scripts.db:push: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env'}); require('child_process').execSync('pnpm --filter @socialflow/db exec prisma db push', {stdio:'inherit', env: process.env})"
scripts.db:reset: node -e "require('dotenv').config({path:'.env'}); require('child_process').execSync('pnpm --filter @socialflow/db exec prisma db push --force-reset', {stdio:'inherit', env: process.env})"
